title: Support runtime reference to cell/interface array

features.name: interface array access via for-loop variable in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an interface array element accessed using a for-loop integer variable inside an always_comb block

features.name: interface array assignment via for-loop variable in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an interface array element assigned using a for-loop integer variable inside an always_comb block

features.name: generate for loop with genvar for interface array indexing workaround
features.description: Code should include a generate statement with genvar loop to workaround the limitation of interface array indexing in procedural code
features.snippet:
generate
    for (genvar i = 0; i < N; i++) begin
        assign iface_array[i].signal = sig_array[i];
    end
endgenerate
